lyrics.text: Put on your war paint
lyrics.translation: 披上你的戎装吧

lyrics.text: You are a brick tied to me that's dragging me down
lyrics.translation: 你虽如巨石加身将我拽入深渊

lyrics.text: Strike a match and I'll burn you to the ground
lyrics.translation: 但我会划亮火柴将你烧至乌有

lyrics.text: We are the jack-o-lanterns in July
lyrics.translation: 我们如七月的南瓜灯

lyrics.text: Setting fire to the sky
lyrics.translation: 恣意燃烧划破天际

lyrics.text: Here, here comes this rising tide
lyrics.translation: 而如今潮涨来袭危机四起

lyrics.text: So come on
lyrics.translation: 吾辈尽将奔赴战场英勇杀敌

lyrics.text: Put on your war paint
lyrics.translation: 披上你的戎装吧

lyrics.text: Cross walks and crossed hearts and hope-to-dies
lyrics.translation: 吾愿背负十字，默默祈祷，战死沙场

lyrics.text: Silver clouds with grey linings
lyrics.translation: 而我已经看见乌云背后胜利的曙光

lyrics.text: So we can take the world back from a heart attack
lyrics.translation: 我们终将从失落暴戾手中夺回城池

lyrics.text: One maniac at a time we will take it back
lyrics.translation: 甚至一个狂躁的战士就够了

lyrics.text: You know time crawls on when you're waiting for the song to start
lyrics.translation: 你也知道当你在等待战歌响起之时时间也在匆匆流逝

lyrics.text: So dance alone to the beat of your heart
lyrics.translation: 所以独自随心舞动吧

lyrics.text: Hey! young blood!
lyrics.translation: 嘿！年轻人！

lyrics.text: Doesn't it feel like our time is running out?
lyrics.translation: 你难道感受不到时光飞逝所剩无几？

lyrics.text: I'm gonna change you like a remix
lyrics.translation: 我一定会像混音一样天翻地覆地改造你

lyrics.text: Then I'll raise you like a phoenix
lyrics.translation: 接着你便会如凤凰涅槃般崛起

lyrics.text: Wearing our vintage misery
lyrics.translation: 我们都带着曾经的苦难忧伤

lyrics.text: No, I think it looked a little better on me
lyrics.translation: 不，我觉得我伤的更深懂得愈多

lyrics.text: I'm gonna change you like a remix
lyrics.translation: 我定会从头来改变你

lyrics.text: Then I'll raise you like a phoenix
lyrics.translation: 然后再让你如凤凰般涅槃翻飞

lyrics.text: Bring home the boys and scrap scrap metal the tanks
lyrics.translation: 带上那些战争中的热血少年和坦克碎片回家吧

lyrics.text: Get hitched, make a career out of robbing banks
lyrics.translation: 结个婚，然后说不定以抢银行度过余生

lyrics.text: Because the world is just a teller and we are wearing black masks
lyrics.translation: 因为世间只讲述历史而我们只是活在黑暗笼罩下的普通人

lyrics.text: "You broke our spirit," says the note we pass
lyrics.translation: 而那转手相传的纸条上赫然写着“你击垮了我们的精神”

lyrics.text: So we can take the world back from a heart attack
lyrics.translation: 所以我们终将夺回这个世界

lyrics.text: One maniac at a time we will take it back
lyrics.translation: 有时一个疯子就够了

lyrics.text: You know time crawls on when you're waiting for the song to start
lyrics.translation: 你也知道当你在等待战歌响起之时时间也在匆匆流逝

lyrics.text: So dance alone to the beat of your heart
lyrics.translation: 所以独自随心而动吧

lyrics.text: Hey! young blood!
lyrics.translation: 嘿！热血青年！

lyrics.text: Doesn't it feel like our time is running out?
lyrics.translation: 你难道感受不到大限将至吗？

lyrics.text: I'm gonna change you like a remix
lyrics.translation: 我一定会像混音一样天翻地覆地改造你

lyrics.text: Then I'll raise you like a phoenix
lyrics.translation: 接着你便会如凤凰涅槃般崛起

lyrics.text: Wearing our vintage misery
lyrics.translation: 我们都带着曾经同样的苦难忧伤

lyrics.text: No, I think it looked a little better on me
lyrics.translation: 不，我还是觉得我理解更深

lyrics.text: I'm gonna change you like a remix
lyrics.translation: 我定会像混音样改变你

lyrics.text: Then I'll raise you like a phoenix
lyrics.translation: 然后再让你如凤凰般涅槃翻飞

lyrics.text: Put on your war paint
lyrics.translation: 画上你战争所需的伪装吧

lyrics.text: The war is won, before it's begun
lyrics.translation: 这场恶斗我们不战而胜

lyrics.text: Release the doves, surrender love
lyrics.translation: 放飞和平，交出了爱

lyrics.text: The war is won, before it's begun
lyrics.translation: 这场恶斗我们不战而胜

lyrics.text: Release the doves, surrender love
lyrics.translation: 放飞和平，拥抱了爱

lyrics.text: The war is won, before it's begun
lyrics.translation: 这场恶斗我们不战而胜

lyrics.text: Release the doves, surrender love (Wave the white flag!)
lyrics.translation: 放飞和平，交出了爱（白旗挥舞）

lyrics.text: The war is won, before it's begun (Wave the white flag!)
lyrics.translation: 这场恶斗我们不战而胜

lyrics.text: Release the doves, surrender love (Wave the white flag!)
lyrics.translation: 放飞和平，拥抱了爱（白旗舞动）

lyrics.text: Heyyyyyyyy
lyrics.translation: 嘿！

lyrics.text: Young Blood!
lyrics.translation: 热爱摇滚的年轻人们！

lyrics.text: Doesn't it feel like our time is running out?
lyrics.translation: 你们难道感受不到我们都命不久矣？

lyrics.text: I'm gonna change you like a remix
lyrics.translation: 我一定会像混音一样天翻地覆地改造你

lyrics.text: Then I'll raise you like a phoenix
lyrics.translation: 接着你便会如凤凰涅槃般崛起

lyrics.text: Wearing our vintage misery
lyrics.translation: 我们都带着曾经同样的苦难忧伤

lyrics.text: No, I think it looked a little better on me
lyrics.translation: 不，我还是觉得我理解更深

lyrics.text: I'm gonna change you like a remix
lyrics.translation: 我定会像混音样改变你

lyrics.text: Then I'll raise you like a phoenix
lyrics.translation: 然后再让你如凤凰般涅槃翻飞

lyrics.text: Hey! young blood!
lyrics.translation: 嘿！激情四溢的热血青年们！

lyrics.text: Doesn't it feel like our time is running out?
lyrics.translation: 你们难道感受不到大限将至吗？

lyrics.text: I'm gonna change you like a remix
lyrics.translation: 我一定会像混音一样天翻地覆地改造你

lyrics.text: Then I'll raise you like a phoenix
lyrics.translation: 接着你便会如凤凰涅槃般崛起

lyrics.text: Put on your war paint
lyrics.translation: 还请画好你的战妆
